title: TTRPG Librarian Bot — Internal Data Schemas (LLM Cache)
description: Formal JSON Schemas for the configuration and state structures used by the Librarian Bot. Update atomically with any structural change.

QUOTA_MAX_REQUESTS.description: Maximum DeepSeek-routed requests per user inside the sliding window.

QUOTA_WINDOW_HOURS.description: Sliding window length (hours) for the per-user quota.

QUOTA_STATE_PATH.description: Filesystem path of the persistent quota store (relative to WORKDIR).

QuotaState.description: Persistent per-user quota tracker stored at QUOTA_STATE_PATH. Each key is a Discord user snowflake; each value is an array of millisecond timestamps (request times within the sliding window).

items.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when a quota slot was consumed.

QuotaDecision.description: Result of consumeQuota(userId) — the runtime decision passed back to handleRagQuery.

allowed.description: true if the request fits inside the user's window and a slot was consumed.

used.description: Slots consumed inside the current window AFTER this decision.

remaining.description: Slots still available in the current window AFTER this decision.

resetAt.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the user's oldest slot expires (null when no slots are used).
